findings.title: Docs folder is disallowed in robots.txt
Comparison pages rely on dense prose instead of question-led answer sections
evidence: /compare/widget-vs-rival uses long prose blocks instead of direct answers

findings.title: Pricing page exposes thin answer text
evidence: /pricing contains one short paragraph and no question-led sections

unknowns: Prompt monitoring is present, but citation logs were sampled rather than exhaustively exported.
nextActions: Treat prompt coverage as a separate prioritization layer after the crawl blocker is fixed.

promptCoverage.summary: Prompt-aware evidence shows strong owned-page coverage for pricing questions but missing support for integration setup prompts.

categories.notes: Owned pages are cited, but the page still lacks strong answer-shaped structure.
No reliable owned page was cited for setup prompts in the monitored sample.
